nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or untrustworthy for preparation
nodes.grounding_span: I generally turn to AI for help with tasks that I do not have time to do

nodes.label: AI ability to produce age-appropriate content
nodes.label_negative: AI producing content above student level
nodes.grounding_span: AI often creates content that is obviously written above the level that a student of a certain age would write

nodes.label: AI as formatting and synthesizing tool
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to correctly format visual elements
nodes.grounding_span: I did not ask AI for help because I didn't think the practice test it created would be correctly formatted

nodes.label: Human diagnostic skill vs AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am very experienced with interacting with a student to find out where he or she is having difficulty

nodes.label: AI as personal relationship maintainer
nodes.grounding_span: I build personal relationships with my students and their families and they tend to stay with me

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: tasks that I do not have time to do

nodes.label: Student comprehension and age-appropriate learning
nodes.grounding_span: AI gives an explanation that is on a level that my student can easily understand

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and unique voice
nodes.grounding_span: the writing that the student is producing is age-appropriate and uses the student's own words

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and trust
nodes.grounding_span: both the parents and the students appreciate the human touch and having a real person to talk to and learn from

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: it is particularly satisfying when AI gives an explanation that is on a level that my student can easily understand

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting
nodes.grounding_span: I did not ask AI for help because I didn't think the practice test it created would be correctly formatted

nodes.label: Preference for human editing of student writing
nodes.grounding_span: If a student needs help with editing a paper, I prefer to do that myself

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really concern myself with being replaced by AI

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting
nodes.grounding_span: When AI becomes more capable of creating math tests that include all of the geometric figures and symbols... I will use it to create more of the practice tests

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation — uses AI only for specific, bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to delegate complete tasks for it to handle independently

nodes.label: Domain-based selective use — uses AI only for certain subjects/tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I generally turn to AI for help with tasks that I do not have time to do, or ask AI specific questions
